#  Transform your world with us Fujitsu Careers  

![A man on a rock, using a laptop, surrounded by nature](https://global.fujitsu/-/media/Project/Fujitsu/Fujitsu-HQ/Career/KV_career.jpg?rev=387236ee4b414cbcb5c9ed2595910523&hash=1FE44F5D860570F2B6F4194C6BCA6D85)
  * [ Development opportunities ](https://global.fujitsu/en-global/careers#opportunities)
  * [ Our promise to you ](https://global.fujitsu/en-global/careers#promise)
  * [ In your country ](https://global.fujitsu/en-global/careers#country)


## Your career at Fujitsu  

Fujitsu’s purpose is to make the world more sustainable by building trust in society through innovation. As the digital transformation partner of choice for customers around the globe, our 113,000 employees work to resolve some of the greatest challenges facing humanity. Our range of services and solutions draw on five key technologies: AI, Computing, Networks, Data & Security, and Converging Technologies, which we bring together to deliver sustainability transformation.  
  
At Fujitsu, we combine technical expertise with innovation to deliver technology services that make a real difference. Our teams support industries across the globe - including finance, retail, manufacturing, and the public sector - by developing and implementing solutions that help businesses and communities thrive.  
  
We’re looking for individuals who want to make an impact with technology, work on projects that matter, and grow in a collaborative, inclusive environment.  
  
Here, your ideas are valued, your growth matters, and your work contributes to Fujitsu’s global mission for a more sustainable world. Explore our open roles and help us build the future!  

### We've met before  

![A man gently holds a baby in a lush green field, surrounded by nature under a clear blue sky.](https://global.fujitsu/-/media/Project/Fujitsu/Fujitsu-HQ/Career/We-ve-met-before.jpg?h=500&iar=0&w=809&rev=5e12860a7a2d4aec84516a31fa48baee&hash=F2D45B5C08C76B85A58A3DDC821E8D44)
You may not see us, but chances are, Fujitsu has already been part of your everyday life. For more than 90 years, our technology has quietly supported the systems people rely on, from the services they use at home to the infrastructure that keeps entire nations running. Whether it’s retailers serving millions of customers, financial institutions safeguarding transactions, energy companies powering communities, or public organisations supporting society, Fujitsu has stood behind some of the world’s most trusted institutions.  
  
But our legacy is not just about longevity, it’s about impact. Decades of engineering excellence, problem-solving, and partnership have shaped who we are today: a global technology leader committed to creating a safer, more sustainable, and more connected future. We combine deep experience with forward-thinking innovation to help societies evolve, businesses transform, and people thrive.  
  
As the world becomes more digital, more complex, and more interconnected, the role we play becomes even more meaningful. We’re building technology with purpose - solutions that protect what matters, unlock new possibilities, and improve lives in ways big and small.  

[ Read more ](https://global.fujitsu/global/about/purpose/)
## Development opportunities at Fujitsu
[ Diversity, Equity & Inclusion](https://global.fujitsu/en-global/about/activities/global-fde)
Be a responsible business that reflects the diversity of our world. Build an inclusive and equitable culture where everyone belongs and can be completely themselves.
![](https://global.fujitsu/-/media/Project/Fujitsu/Fujitsu-HQ/Career/Careers_809x500.jpg?rev=c072357525a142cbbfafef230bfbe622&hash=B38D67F80D9A9DA970772799816FB98D)
[ Fujitsu Distinguished Engineer Program](https://global.fujitsu/en-global/sustainability/diversity)
The "Global Fujitsu Distinguished Engineer (Global-FDE)" program certifies engineers who have outstanding technical skills in fields important to Fujitsu's future business growth strategy, and contribute to business strategy and provide added value to customers.
![](https://global.fujitsu/-/media/Project/Fujitsu/Fujitsu-HQ/Career/Img1.jpg?rev=d9317177d5684403b5f967282a0f123e&hash=1A6F2FBA8902F8073F912C4D826D663F)
[ Design Thinking / Co-Creation Program](https://global.fujitsu/en-apac/local/co-creation-program)
Today's complex challenges require a proactive, strategic design approach to leverage rapid technological advances sustainably and effectively. Design Thinking is the key to unlocking the potential.
![](https://global.fujitsu/-/media/Project/Fujitsu/Fujitsu-HQ/Career/Img2.jpg?rev=bd96b041df61470ead74078050319010&hash=00E7FD2D9DF489EA119F0BC849C5F7B4)
### Our promise to you  

Work your way 
Enjoy the flexibility to shape a career that fits your life. Choose from remote, hybrid, or in-office options, all while receiving the support you need to thrive with us.
![A man sitting with a laptop on his lap, conversing on the phone while seated in a chair.](https://global.fujitsu/-/media/Project/Fujitsu/Fujitsu-HQ/Career/Work-Your-Way.jpg?h=500&iar=0&w=809&rev=434e287108ab4bd28ce209d6b8e49725&hash=4ADE93866760EE3041441EB50FDE0D9D)
Do the right thing  

Make a meaningful impact through ethical and sustainable work. Join us in our commitment to social responsibility, innovation, and positive change.
![A woman stands confidently in front of a large screen displaying colorful graphics.](https://global.fujitsu/-/media/Project/Fujitsu/Fujitsu-HQ/Career/Dotherightthing.jpg?h=500&iar=0&w=809&rev=be80dfd8266d432f990fb7c998fa190e&hash=E88CF330A2CA8F778584E7C8897D11E0)
Trusted to transform  

Take charge of your development and play a key role in our evolution. We invest in your growth and empower you to lead transformative change.
![A woman with glasses gazes upward, observing the sky with a thoughtful expression.](https://global.fujitsu/-/media/Project/Fujitsu/Fujitsu-HQ/Career/Trustedtotransform.jpg?h=500&iar=0&w=809&rev=53ab4745ea1b48f8aafeb899dbc143e3&hash=881980DC82A533431A8E8586E084037D)
Achieve together  

Attaining your career goal.  

Collaborate with talented colleagues in a supportive, inclusive environment. At Fujitsu, we create extraordinary outcomes that make a difference—together.
![A group of friends joyfully laughing and smiling, capturing a lively and positive atmosphere among them.](https://global.fujitsu/-/media/Project/Fujitsu/Fujitsu-HQ/Career/Img4.jpg?h=432&iar=0&w=700&rev=6a1090e15e214f16819e58be54d97576&hash=76DE094AC89046C2695850FC58D5D4C4)
Global reach, local impact 
Be part of a global force for good. We value diversity and strive to create positive impacts in communities worldwide.  

![A couple enjoys a walk in a park, with a city skyline rising in the background.](https://global.fujitsu/-/media/Project/Fujitsu/Fujitsu-HQ/Career/Globalreachlocalreach.jpg?h=500&iar=0&w=809&rev=63628f026dc34846b1671a66b2d1105c&hash=4B8CFDA300478D639BED0A8983E3BAE0)
Why join Fujitsu?
![Suitcase](https://global.fujitsu/-/media/Project/Fujitsu/Fujitsu-HQ/Career/careers-symbol4.png?h=100&iar=0&w=209&rev=c15bf8bc69ab466ba77dc50b20189e31&hash=35F555742F004C3217BD9536BB44A718)
**Diverse career opportunities**
Diverse career opportunities across IT, consulting, cybersecurity, digital services, cloud, and more
![people handes symbol](https://global.fujitsu/-/media/Project/Fujitsu/Fujitsu-HQ/Career/careers-symbol3.png?h=100&iar=0&w=209&rev=b0d547079b654351832c57e9ca6d2848&hash=9E99E44F0AFEB6B3F2AC375C796B1A2E)
**A culture of belonging**
A culture of belonging where diverse perspectives and backgrounds are celebrated
![A white background with black lines](https://global.fujitsu/-/media/Project/Fujitsu/Fujitsu-HQ/Career/careers-symbol2.png?h=100&iar=0&w=209&rev=57f2992fa17b44c882c507675772102a&hash=821E40D9E7F6C81AF15A4FE153974090)
**Opportunities to grow**
Opportunities to grow with global development programs and on-the-job learning
![people symbol](https://global.fujitsu/-/media/Project/Fujitsu/Fujitsu-HQ/Career/careers-symbol1.png?h=100&iar=0&w=209&rev=8ccb0c7727304d8795bdb9a91c80cec4&hash=08EE492D76E16BE380AB38C9EF3F4CAA)
**Purpose-led innovation**
Purpose-led innovation that addresses real-world challenges
Let’s shape the future together
Whether you're just starting your career or looking for your next opportunity, Fujitsu offers a place to grow, be inspired and make a difference.
[ Explore careers by country and take the next step today. ](https://global.fujitsu/en-global/careers#country)
  * [Fujitsu in North America](https://global.fujitsu/en-global/careers#anc01)
  * [Fujitsu in Europe](https://global.fujitsu/en-global/careers#anc02)

## Fujitsu in North America
Fulfilling your career potential
Fujitsu has a number of companies in North America covering IT products, network communications and research laboratories. We offer a wide range of exciting career opportunities within engineering, development, sales, services, manufacturing, and administration - including; finance, accounting, human resources, facilities, and IT.
[ USA ](https://global.fujitsu/en-us/careers)
[ Canada (English) ](https://global.fujitsu/en-ca/careers)
[ Canada (French) ](https://global.fujitsu/fr-ca/careers)
## Fujitsu in Europe
Attaining your career goal
Fujitsu offers employment opportunities in Europe across a wide range of roles; from sales and marketing, to engineering and product development for individuals with the skills and expertise to deliver competitive advantage to our customers. With a wide range of training programs, we help support our employees’ developmental needs and career goals. A large number of global roles are based out of Europe.
[ United Kingdom ](https://global.fujitsu/en-uk/careers)

## Fujitsu in Asia Pacific (APAC)
Supporting career development
Fujitsu has operations across the Asia Pacific with offices in Australia, New Zealand, Japan, China, South East Asia, India and the Middle East. Each provides a wide range of employment opportunities for individuals with the skills and expertise to help deliver competitive advantage to our customers. We offer an inclusive workplace environment where employees are offered equal opportunities based on merit regardless of age, gender, ethnicity, disabilities, values, beliefs, religion, or sexual preferences. We recruit the highest possible calibre of staff to our positions; whether that's technical, customer service, managerial, sales, or clerical.
[ Australia ](https://global.fujitsu/en-apac/careers)
[ New Zealand ](https://global.fujitsu/en-apac/careers/oceania)
[ Indonesia ](https://global.fujitsu/id-apac/careers)

## Fujitsu in Central America and the Caribbean
Maximizing your promotional prospects
Fujitsu operates across the Caribbean with roles available in management, sales, technical, clerical, and customer service. We employ professionals with a wealth of specialized skills to ensure the delivery of sustainable and profitable growth for our customers. All our employees are offered promotional opportunities and are encouraged to apply for jobs that increase their experience and knowledge to enhance their career.
[ Caribbean ](https://global.fujitsu/en-caribbean/careers)
[ Costa Rica ](https://global.fujitsu/en-global/careers/costa-rica)
## Fujitsu South America
Developing your knowledge and skills
Fujitsu’s operations in South America offer an exciting opportunity to work in a dynamic setting alongside motivated and talented colleagues. We place great value in our people and their growth, recognizing that they are essential to our success. Our goal is to foster a supportive workplace that promotes a healthy work-life balance. Explore career opportunities in Brazil and Argentina and take the next step toward a strong, fulfilling professional journey.
[ South America ](https://global.fujitsu/es-southamerica/careers)
## Fujitsu Japan
Providing a workplace to thrive and grow
Fujitsu Japan is an equal opportunity employer that abides by the employment ethics code set out by the Japan Economic Federation. We are committed to developing a diverse and inclusive work environment in which every employee can contribute and thrive.
[ Japan ](https://fujitsu.recruiting.jp.fujitsu.com/)

Your career at Fujitsu

Fujitsu’s purpose is to make the world more sustainable by building trust in society through innovation. As the digital transformation partner of choice for customers around the globe, our 113,000 employees work to resolve some of the greatest challenges facing humanity. Our range of services and solutions draw on five key technologies: AI, Computing, Networks, Data & Security, and Converging Technologies, which we bring together to deliver sustainability transformation.

At Fujitsu, we combine technical expertise with innovation to deliver technology services that make a real difference. Our teams support industries across the globe - including finance, retail, manufacturing, and the public sector - by developing and implementing solutions that help businesses and communities thrive.

We’re looking for individuals who want to make an impact with technology, work on projects that matter, and grow in a collaborative, inclusive environment.

Here, your ideas are valued, your growth matters, and your work contributes to Fujitsu’s global mission for a more sustainable world. Explore our open roles and help us build the future!

We've met before

You may not see us, but chances are, Fujitsu has already been part of your everyday life. For more than 90 years, our technology has quietly supported the systems people rely on, from the services they use at home to the infrastructure that keeps entire nations running. Whether it’s retailers serving millions of customers, financial institutions safeguarding transactions, energy companies powering communities, or public organisations supporting society, Fujitsu has stood behind some of the world’s most trusted institutions.

But our legacy is not just about longevity, it’s about impact. Decades of engineering excellence, problem-solving, and partnership have shaped who we are today: a global technology leader committed to creating a safer, more sustainable, and more connected future. We combine deep experience with forward-thinking innovation to help societies evolve, businesses transform, and people thrive.

As the world becomes more digital, more complex, and more interconnected, the role we play becomes even more meaningful. We’re building technology with purpose - solutions that protect what matters, unlock new possibilities, and improve lives in ways big and small.

Development opportunities at Fujitsu

Diversity, Equity & Inclusion

Be a responsible business that reflects the diversity of our world. Build an inclusive and equitable culture where everyone belongs and can be completely themselves.

Fujitsu Distinguished Engineer Program

The "Global Fujitsu Distinguished Engineer (Global-FDE)" program certifies engineers who have outstanding technical skills in fields important to Fujitsu's future business growth strategy, and contribute to business strategy and provide added value to customers.

Design Thinking / Co-Creation Program

Today's complex challenges require a proactive, strategic design approach to leverage rapid technological advances sustainably and effectively. Design Thinking is the key to unlocking the potential.

Our promise to you

Work your way

Enjoy the flexibility to shape a career that fits your life. Choose from remote, hybrid, or in-office options, all while receiving the support you need to thrive with us.

Do the right thing

Make a meaningful impact through ethical and sustainable work. Join us in our commitment to social responsibility, innovation, and positive change.

Trusted to transform

Take charge of your development and play a key role in our evolution. We invest in your growth and empower you to lead transformative change.

Achieve together

Attaining your career goal.

Collaborate with talented colleagues in a supportive, inclusive environment. At Fujitsu, we create extraordinary outcomes that make a difference—together.

Global reach, local impact

Be part of a global force for good. We value diversity and strive to create positive impacts in communities worldwide.

Fujitsu in North America

Fulfilling your career potential

Fujitsu has a number of companies in North America covering IT products, network communications and research laboratories. We offer a wide range of exciting career opportunities within engineering, development, sales, services, manufacturing, and administration - including; finance, accounting, human resources, facilities, and IT.

Fujitsu in Europe

Attaining your career goal

Fujitsu offers employment opportunities in Europe across a wide range of roles; from sales and marketing, to engineering and product development for individuals with the skills and expertise to deliver competitive advantage to our customers. With a wide range of training programs, we help support our employees’ developmental needs and career goals. A large number of global roles are based out of Europe.

Fujitsu in Asia Pacific (APAC)

Supporting career development

Fujitsu has operations across the Asia Pacific with offices in Australia, New Zealand, Japan, China, South East Asia, India and the Middle East. Each provides a wide range of employment opportunities for individuals with the skills and expertise to help deliver competitive advantage to our customers. We offer an inclusive workplace environment where employees are offered equal opportunities based on merit regardless of age, gender, ethnicity, disabilities, values, beliefs, religion, or sexual preferences. We recruit the highest possible calibre of staff to our positions; whether that's technical, customer service, managerial, sales, or clerical.

Fujitsu in Central America and the Caribbean

Maximizing your promotional prospects

Fujitsu operates across the Caribbean with roles available in management, sales, technical, clerical, and customer service. We employ professionals with a wealth of specialized skills to ensure the delivery of sustainable and profitable growth for our customers. All our employees are offered promotional opportunities and are encouraged to apply for jobs that increase their experience and knowledge to enhance their career.

Fujitsu South America

Developing your knowledge and skills

Fujitsu’s operations in South America offer an exciting opportunity to work in a dynamic setting alongside motivated and talented colleagues. We place great value in our people and their growth, recognizing that they are essential to our success. Our goal is to foster a supportive workplace that promotes a healthy work-life balance. Explore career opportunities in Brazil and Argentina and take the next step toward a strong, fulfilling professional journey.

Fujitsu Japan

Providing a workplace to thrive and grow

Fujitsu Japan is an equal opportunity employer that abides by the employment ethics code set out by the Japan Economic Federation. We are committed to developing a diverse and inclusive work environment in which every employee can contribute and thrive.
